name: Pharmacy Management
description: Complete pharmacy management system — manage medicine inventory, process prescriptions, track stock levels, and handle supplier orders with expiration date monitoring.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchMedicines
capabilities.description: Search for medicines by name, active ingredient, or category

capabilities.name: createPrescription
capabilities.description: Create a new prescription for a patient

capabilities.name: getInventory
capabilities.description: Get inventory item with stock level and expiry info

capabilities.name: updateInventory
capabilities.description: Update stock levels, pricing, or supplier info

capabilities.name: deleteMedicine
capabilities.description: Remove a medicine from the catalog

capabilities.name: getPrescription
capabilities.description: Get prescription details with medications and dosage

capabilities.name: searchPrescriptions
capabilities.description: Search prescriptions by patient, doctor, or date

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read pharmacy data including medicines, prescriptions, and inventory

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update medicines, prescriptions, inventory, and suppliers

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete medicines, prescriptions, and inventory records

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full pharmacy administration including pricing and regulatory settings
